hero.subtitle: Smart matching with verified psychologists. Clinical tests, secure video calls and continuous follow-up.

what.description: Gantly is the platform that connects mental health and technology. Clinically validated tests, smart matching, secure video calls and continuous follow-up. All in one place.

flow.title: How it works
flow.step1_desc: Complete a brief questionnaire to discover your preferences and therapeutic needs.
flow.step2_desc: Our algorithm analyzes your preferences, personal characteristics and needs to find the ideal psychologist for you.
flow.step3_desc: Connect with your psychologist via HD video call and internal chat in a secure, private environment.
flow.step4_desc: Personalized tasks, mood tracking, progress tests and secure chat between sessions for continuous support.

videochat.title: Secure sessions. Continuous communication.
videochat.subtitle: HD video calls and encrypted chat so your therapy never stops.

professionals.title: Tools designed for professionals
professionals.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your practice from one place.
professionals.card1_desc: Manage your availability and let patients book automatically.
professionals.card2_desc: Anxiety, depression, stress, personality and many more. Apply validated tests and generate detailed reports.
professionals.card3_desc: Payment control, billing history and CSV export with one click.
professionals.card4_desc: Clinical notes, session history and progress tracking.

clinics.title: Manage your clinic from one place
clinics.subtitle: Complete ERP for mental health clinics.

tests.title: Clinically validated tests
tests.subtitle: Detailed reports with psychological profile visualization.
tests.description: From personality tests to clinical evaluations for anxiety, depression and stress. Detailed reports with visualizations for patients and professionals.

trust.title: Your security is our priority
trust.badge1_desc: Full compliance with European data protection regulation.
trust.badge3_desc: Special protection for sensitive mental health data.
trust.badge4_desc: All psychologists go through a verification process.

cta.title: Ready to take care of your mental health?
cta.subtitle: We connect you with the perfect professional for you
